channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.20 (Build 20260303)
item.description:
What's New

fix: auto-capitalize after Enter with empty buffer

  • Extract updateUpperCaseStatus() method in VNEngine for reuse
  • Call updateUpperCaseStatus() in KeyboardEventHandler when Enter

is pressed with empty buffer (sentence-ending detection)

  • Fix backspace count in uppercase application: avoid deleting

characters not yet on screen (hookState.code == vDoNothing)

  • Bump build number to 20260303

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
